title: Unable to login to account
description: Customer reports that login fails even with correct credentials.

title: Payment not reflected
description: Customer completed payment but it is not showing in the account dashboard.

title: Password reset email not received
description: Customer requested password reset but did not receive the email.

title: Incorrect invoice generated
description: Invoice shows incorrect product quantity and total amount.

title: Feature request for dark mode
description: Customer suggested adding a dark mode option in the dashboard.

title: App crashes on startup
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after opening.

title: Unable to upload profile picture
description: Customer gets an error when trying to upload a profile image.

title: Subscription cancellation issue
description: Customer unable to cancel subscription from account settings.

title: Slow dashboard loading
description: Customer reports dashboard takes too long to load.

title: Notification emails not sending
description: System notifications are not being sent to the customer email.

title: Data export not working
description: Customer unable to export reports as CSV or Excel.

title: UI alignment issue on mobile
description: Buttons overlap on smaller mobile screens.

title: Two-factor authentication problem
description: Customer cannot verify OTP during login.

title: Duplicate ticket creation
description: System creates duplicate tickets when customer submits form.

title: Language translation issue
description: Some texts are not properly translated in Bangla language mode.
